name: MULTI-evolve
description: Train neural network models on deep mutational scanning data and rank combinatorial variants. Propose multi-mutants from single-mutation pools using model-guided search. Generate MULTI-assembly mutagenic oligos for nominated variants. Run protein language model zero-shot ensemble nomination for single mutants.
capabilities: Train neural network models on deep mutational scanning data and rank combinatorial variants
Propose multi-mutants from single-mutation pools using model-guided search
Generate MULTI-assembly mutagenic oligos for nominated variants
Run protein language model zero-shot ensemble nomination for single mutants

dmsData.description: Deep mutational scanning data file with mutations and fitness values (CSV format)

mutationPool.description: Single mutation pool to combine into multi-mutants

numVariants.description: Number of combinatorial variants to nominate
